title: Multi-Axis Coupling Tensor Extension
main_verdict: Multi-axis product modules close under the native pairwise coupling tensor registry. Triple or higher latch incidence is native history data but not an independent Weil-compatible higher-order tensor in tested cases; it must project to pairwise bilinear coupling or be rejected by the quadraticity gate.
frontier: Complete arbitrary-history registry and proof that all admissible nondegenerate pairwise coupling tensors are reachable from QBL latch/branch histories.
